description: Inbound COA verification template — parameters we verify on the supplier-issued COA for every lot of HDPE resin received

parameters.remarks: Condition (temperature/load) to match approved grade; e.g. 190°C/2.16 kg for most blow moulding grades
Typical HDPE blow moulding density range 0.940–0.965 g/cm³; confirm with approved grade datasheet
COA value — not tested in-house; acceptance based on supplier COA compliance
COA value — not tested in-house; acceptance based on supplier COA compliance

parameters.test_method: Visual — compare against reference chip / approved standard
parameters.specification: Natural/white; free from discolouration, black specks, yellowing, or foreign contamination
parameters.remarks: Inspector to physically examine representative sample drawn from lot

parameters.test_method: Document check — match lot number on bags to COA
parameters.specification: Lot number on COA must match lot number on bag/jumbo bag labels
parameters.remarks: Critical for traceability; any mismatch is automatic Hold

parameters.parameter_name: Manufacturing Date and Expiry / Use-By Date
parameters.specification: Material must be within shelf life; manufacturing date not older than [TO BE ENTERED] months

notes: If any parameter on the supplier COA is outside specification, or if the COA is missing/unsigned, the lot is placed on HOLD and MR/Quality Manager (R002) is notified before unloading into production store.

description: Outbound COA template — issued by Yash Poly Plast to customer at despatch for each finished goods batch

parameters.specification: As assigned per batch production record
parameters.remarks: Batch number must be traceable to raw material lot used

parameters.specification: [TO BE ENTERED] g ± [TO BE ENTERED] g (product-specific)
parameters.remarks: Record actual mean weight of sample; state sample size

parameters.test_method: Wall thickness gauge measurement at body, shoulder, and base
parameters.specification: Minimum [TO BE ENTERED] mm at all measured points
parameters.remarks: Minimum 3 measurement points per piece; state worst-case (minimum) reading

parameters.test_method: Pressure test / squeeze test per approved method
parameters.remarks: State test pressure ([TO BE ENTERED] psi) and hold duration ([TO BE ENTERED] sec)

parameters.specification: [TO BE ENTERED] mm ± [TO BE ENTERED] mm
[TO BE ENTERED] mm ± [TO BE ENTERED] mm

parameters.test_method: Visual 100% inspection — flash, warpage, colour, surface defects
parameters.specification: No flash, no warpage, no black specks, colour matches approved standard, no surface scratches
parameters.remarks: State any accepted minor cosmetic deviations if customer has approved them

parameters.specification: Opening torque ≥ [TO BE ENTERED] N·cm; closing torque [TO BE ENTERED] N·cm
parameters.remarks: Only applicable where caps are supplied by YPP; omit if customer supplies caps

parameters.specification: As per confirmed customer Purchase Order quantity

notes: This COA is issued per despatch lot. All test results recorded are from the OQC inspection report for the corresponding batch. COA must be attached to the dispatch documentation.
